chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1138 of 2025 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For order on Misc. No.5872/2025 2. For order on office objection No.1 & 2 3. For order on Misc. No.5873/2025 4. For hearing of main case 19.03.2025 Messrs. Zeeshan Memon and Salman Ahmed Danish, advocates for the petitioner Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh 1. Granted. 3. Granted subject to all just exceptions. 2&4. Learned counsel for the petitioner presses this petition to the extent that his application dated 13.03.2025, available at page 7, may be determined by the competent authority, after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner. Learned AAG is present waives notice and states that the said application shall be determined expeditiously, preferably within one week. In view hereof petitioner counsel states that the petition has served its purpose and may be disposed of. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
